title: Gold Nexus Alpha: AI Forecasting & Supply Chain Intelligence Platform
subtitle: Flagship forecasting platform with Deep ML views, JSON artifacts, Gold AI, and ongoing SQL + RAG integration.
summary: A live Next.js forecasting and supply chain intelligence platform built around gold price behavior, macroeconomic signals, model artifacts, Deep ML expert views, and AI-assisted interpretation.
problem: Gold market intelligence is fragmented across price data, macro indicators, news, model outputs, and supply chain context.
solution: Built a deployed platform that organizes forecasting models, artifact-driven analysis, Deep ML pages, validation views, and AI-assisted explanation.
businessValue: Helps users understand gold market behavior without scanning disconnected sources manually.

title: Hershey Supply Chain Intelligence
subtitle: Supply chain transparency, sourcing, cost, and evidence intelligence platform.
summary: A supply chain intelligence platform built from public reports, website screenshots, parsed evidence, and structured data to analyze Hershey supply chain transparency and operational signals.
problem: Supply chain transparency data is scattered across reports, websites, sustainability documents, and public disclosures.
solution: Building an evidence-backed intelligence platform that organizes Hershey supply chain information into recruiter-friendly analytics and business insights.
businessValue: Supports supply chain transparency storytelling, sourcing analysis, procurement review, and operations intelligence.

title: Smart Supply Chain Sales & Operations Analysis
subtitle: Tableau dashboard project for sales, delivery, segmentation, and operational performance.
summary: A Tableau-based supply chain analytics project analyzing sales, profit, delivery performance, customer segmentation, and operational trends.
problem: Operations and sales data needed clearer dashboard-based analysis for business interpretation.
solution: Built Tableau dashboards for performance, delivery risk, customer segmentation, and operational visibility.
businessValue: Shows direct BI and supply chain dashboarding capability.

title: Comparative Financial Statement Analysis: Pharmaceutical Companies
subtitle: Manual SEC 10-K extraction, Excel ratio model, and comparative financial analysis.
summary: A financial statement analysis project comparing pharmaceutical companies using SEC 10-K filings, Excel ratio modeling, and business interpretation.
problem: Financial performance across pharmaceutical companies needed structured comparison using real company filings.
solution: Manually extracted SEC 10-K data, built an Excel ratio model, and prepared a comparative report.
businessValue: Demonstrates real data extraction, Excel modeling, business analysis, and financial interpretation.

title: Chapters 4 Change
subtitle: Strategic marketing and nonprofit story website.
summary: A complete strategic marketing website for a literacy-focused nonprofit concept, including story, past fundraisers, audience messaging, and campaign structure.
problem: The nonprofit concept needed a clear digital story and campaign communication strategy.
solution: Built a complete deployed website presenting story, fundraiser history, and a path to the campaign.
businessValue: Shows marketing strategy translated into a deployed digital experience.

title: The Book Fairies
subtitle: New fundraiser campaign website connected to the broader nonprofit strategy.
summary: A dedicated fundraiser campaign website designed for campaign explanation, donor understanding, and call-to-action structure.
problem: A new fundraiser concept needed focused campaign messaging and a simple digital experience.
solution: Built a separate deployed campaign website connected to the broader nonprofit project.
businessValue: Demonstrates campaign design, audience messaging, and web execution.

title: Meta Case Analysis: Leadership, Culture & Ethics
subtitle: Organizational behavior and management framework analysis.
summary: An organizational behavior and management case analysis of Meta using leadership, culture, ethics, stakeholder, and governance frameworks.
problem: Meta's organizational and leadership challenges required structured MBA-level analysis.
solution: Analyzed Meta through leadership style, cultural dimensions, stakeholder analysis, power dynamics, cognitive bias, and governance recommendations.
businessValue: Shows management reasoning, ethical analysis, communication, and MBA-level business writing.
